note: Core lessons from markdown.engineering (v2.1.88), verified and updated against live v2.1.90/v2.1.91/v2.1.92/v2.1.94/v2.1.96/v2.1.100 binaries. Chapter 12 (L62-L64) covers v2.1.97-v2.1.100 changes: /dream user-facing memory consolidation, Perforce mode, Script Caps, /setup-vertex, custom model capabilities, /buddy removal, and REPL env var cleanup. v2.1.100 itself is bugfix-only relative to v2.1.98.
